signup_description:
Welcome to the Blue Devine Support Centre! 💙

Need assistance? Select the ticket below that best matches your issue, and one of our staff members will assist you as soon as possible.

📋 Available Tickets

🦖 In-Game Support
Report rule violations, player issues, request an in-game admin, or receive assistance with anything happening on the server.

🔨 Ban Appeal
Appeal a game or Discord ban. Our staff will carefully review your appeal and provide a response.

💬 General Support
Have a question about Blue Devine, Discord, our website, rules, events, or anything else? Open a General Support ticket.

💎 Prime Support
Claim your First-Time Prime rewards or receive help with Prime purchases, donations, missing rewards, or payment issues.

🐛 Bug Report
Report bugs, glitches, exploits, or technical issues to help us improve the Blue Devine experience.

📌 Before Opening a Ticket

• Please choose the ticket that best matches your issue.
• Only create one ticket per issue.
• Include as much information and evidence as possible to help us resolve your request quickly.
• Please be patient while waiting for a staff member to respond.

💙 Thank you for choosing Blue Devine. We appreciate your support and hope you enjoy your adventure! 🦖
answer_description: Welcome to the Blue Devine Support Centre!

tickets.label: In-Game Support
tickets.description: Report rule violations, player issues, request an in-game admin, or receive assistance with anything happening on the server.
tickets.title: 🦖 In-Game Support
tickets.message:
🦖 In-Game Support

Hello {user}, welcome to Blue Devine In-Game Support.

Please provide the following information so we can assist you as quickly as possible:

👤 In-Game Name:
🦕 Dinosaur Played:
🕒 Date & Time of the Incident:
📍 Location (if known):
📝 Detailed description of the issue:
📎 Screenshots, videos, or other evidence (if available):

If your report involves another player, please include their in-game name and explain exactly what happened.

A member of our staff team will review your ticket and respond as soon as possible. Please be patient and avoid creating multiple tickets for the same issue.

💙 Thank you for helping us keep Blue Devine fair and enjoyable for everyone!

tickets.label: Ban Appeal
tickets.description: Appeal a game or Discord ban. Our staff will carefully review your appeal and provide a response.
tickets.title: 🔨 Ban Appeal
tickets.message:
🔨 Ban Appeal

Hello {user}, welcome to the Blue Devine Ban Appeal ticket.

If you believe your ban was issued unfairly or you'd like to request a second chance, please complete the following information:

👤 Discord Username:
🦖 In-Game Name:
📅 Date of Ban (if known):
📝 Reason for Ban (if known):
💬 Why should your ban be reconsidered?
📎 Any evidence or additional information (optional):

Please be honest and respectful throughout your appeal. Providing false information or being disrespectful towards staff may result in your appeal being denied.

A member of our staff team will review your appeal as soon as possible. Please be patient and do not create multiple appeal tickets.

💙 Thank you for your patience,
The Blue Devine Staff Team

tickets.label: General Support
tickets.description: Have a question about Blue Devine, Discord, our website, rules, events, or anything else? Open a General Support ticket.
tickets.title: 🎫 Welcome to Blue Devine Support
tickets.message:
🎫 Welcome to Blue Devine Support

Hello {user}! 👋

Thank you for opening a support ticket.

A member of our staff team will be with you as soon as possible. While you wait, please provide the following information so we can assist you faster:

📌 Reason for your ticket:
📌 Your in-game name (if applicable):
📌 Any screenshots, videos, or evidence:
📌 A detailed explanation of your issue:

Please remain patient and avoid pinging staff unless your issue is urgent.

Thank you for supporting Blue Devine! 💙

tickets.label: Prime Support
tickets.description: Claim your First-Time Prime rewards or receive help with Prime purchases, donations, missing rewards, or payment issues.
tickets.title: 💎 Prime Support
tickets.message:
💎 Prime Support

Hello {user}, welcome to Blue Devine Prime Support.

Whether you're claiming your First-Time Prime reward or need help with a Prime purchase or donation, you've come to the right place.

Please complete the information below:

👤 Discord Username:
🦖 In-Game Name:
🆔 Steam ID (if required):
📋 Reason for opening this ticket: (First-Time Prime / Donation / Prime Support)
💳 What did you purchase? (If applicable)
📅 Date of Purchase or Date Joined Blue Devine:
🧾 Transaction ID or Receipt: (If applicable)
📝 Additional Information:

🌟 First-Time Prime

If you're claiming First-Time Prime, our staff will verify your eligibility before granting your rewards.

Please note: First-Time Prime can only be claimed once per player. Duplicate claims will be denied.

💰 Donation & Prime Purchases

If you're contacting us about a donation or Prime purchase, please attach any receipts or proof of payment to help us resolve your issue as quickly as possible.

A member of our staff team will review your ticket and assist you as soon as possible.

💙 Thank you for supporting Blue Devine!

tickets.label: Bug Report
tickets.description: Report bugs, glitches, exploits, or technical issues to help us improve the Blue Devine experience.
tickets.title: 🐛 Bug Report
tickets.message:
🐛 Bug Report

Hello {user}, welcome to the Blue Devine Bug Report ticket.

Found a bug? Please help us improve the server by providing as much information as possible.

🦖 In-Game Name:
📍 Where did the bug occur?
📝 Describe the bug in detail:
🔄 Steps to reproduce the bug (if known):
📅 Date & Time:
📎 Screenshots or Videos (highly recommended):

Please include as much detail as possible. The more information you provide, the easier it is for our team to investigate and resolve the issue.

Thank you for helping us make Blue Devine a better experience for everyone! 💙
